content.content:
1	# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
2	"""Stage factories for the Qwen3-TTS Base pipeline."""
3	
4	from __future__ import annotations
5	
6	import logging
7	import os
8	from typing import Any
9	
10	import torch
11	
12	from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.compat import (
13	    apply_qwen_tts_transformers_compatibility_patches,
14	)
15	from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.payload_types import Qwen3TTSState
16	from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.request_builders import (
17	    cleanup_prepared_qwen3_tts_request,
18	    preprocess_qwen3_tts_payload,
19	)
20	from sglang_omni.proto import StagePayload
21	from sglang_omni.scheduling.pipeline_state import build_usage
22	from sglang_omni.scheduling.pipeline_state import load_state as _load_pipeline_state
23	from sglang_omni.scheduling.pipeline_state import store_state as _store_pipeline_state
24	from sglang_omni.scheduling.simple_scheduler import SimpleScheduler
25	from sglang_omni.scheduling.vocoder_base import BatchVocoderBase
26	from sglang_omni.utils.audio_payload import audio_waveform_payload
27	from sglang_omni.utils.checkpoint import resolve_checkpoint as _resolve_checkpoint
28	
29	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
30	
31	_QWEN_TTS_INSTALL_HINT = (
32	    "Qwen3-TTS support requires the official `qwen-tts` package. "
33	    "Install `qwen-tts==0.1.1` and its Transformers 4.57.3 requirement "
34	    "in the serving environment before launching Qwen3-TTS."
35	)
36	
37	
38	def load_state(payload: StagePayload) -> Qwen3TTSState:
39	    return _load_pipeline_state(payload, Qwen3TTSState)
40	
41	
42	def store_state(payload: StagePayload, state: Qwen3TTSState) -> StagePayload:
43	    return _store_pipeline_state(payload, state)
44	
45	
46	def _load_qwen3_tts_tokenizer(
47	    model_path: str,
48	    *,
49	    device: str,
50	    dtype: str,
51	    attn_implementation: str | None,
52	):
53	    apply_qwen_tts_transformers_compatibility_patches()
54	    try:
55	        from qwen_tts import Qwen3TTSTokenizer
56	    except ImportError as exc:
57	        raise RuntimeError(_QWEN_TTS_INSTALL_HINT) from exc
58	
59	    checkpoint_dir = _resolve_checkpoint(model_path)
60	    tokenizer_path = os.path.join(checkpoint_dir, "speech_tokenizer")
61	    torch_dtype = getattr(torch, dtype) if isinstance(dtype, str) else dtype
62	    kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
63	        "device_map": device,
64	        "dtype": torch_dtype,
65	    }
66	    if attn_implementation is not None:
67	        kwargs["attn_implementation"] = attn_implementation
68	
69	    logger.info(f"Loading Qwen3-TTS speech tokenizer from {tokenizer_path} on {device}")
70	    return Qwen3TTSTokenizer.from_pretrained(tokenizer_path, **kwargs)
71	
72	
73	def _register_qwen3_tts_hf_config() -> None:
74	    apply_qwen_tts_transformers_compatibility_patches()
75	    try:
76	        from qwen_tts.core.models import Qwen3TTSConfig
77	        from transformers import AutoConfig
78	    except ImportError as exc:
79	        raise RuntimeError(_QWEN_TTS_INSTALL_HINT) from exc
80	    if not hasattr(Qwen3TTSConfig, "_sglang_omni_patched"):
81	        original_init = Qwen3TTSConfig.__init__
82	
83	        def _patched_init(self, *args, **kwargs):
84	            original_init(self, *args, **kwargs)
85	            talker_config = getattr(self, "talker_config", None)
86	            if talker_config is not None:
87	                self.text_config = talker_config
88	
89	        Qwen3TTSConfig.__init__ = _patched_init
90	        Qwen3TTSConfig._sglang_omni_patched = True
91	    try:
92	        AutoConfig.register("qwen3_tts", Qwen3TTSConfig)
93	    except ValueError:
94	        pass
95	
96	
97	def _load_qwen3_tts_generate_defaults(checkpoint_dir: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
98	    import json
99	
100	    path = os.path.join(checkpoint_dir, "generation_config.json")
101	    if not os.path.exists(path):
102	        return {}
103	    with open(path, encoding="utf-8") as f:
104	        data = json.load(f)
105	    return data if isinstance(data, dict) else {}
106	
107	
108	def _compile_qwen3_tts_backbone(model: Any) -> None:
109	    """Compile decoder blocks while leaving decode-input staging eager."""
110	
111	    text_model = model.model
112	    layers = text_model.layers
113	
114	    from sglang.srt.model_executor.cuda_graph_runner import set_torch_compile_config
115	
116	    set_torch_compile_config()
117	    compile_mode = os.environ.get(
118	        "SGLANG_TORCH_COMPILE_MODE",
119	        "max-autotune-no-cudagraphs",
120	    )
121	    text_model._compiled_decode_layers = [
122	        torch.compile(layer, mode=compile_mode) for layer in layers
123	    ]
124	
125	
126	def create_preprocessing_executor(model_path: str) -> SimpleScheduler:
127	    del model_path
128	    return SimpleScheduler(
129	        preprocess_qwen3_tts_payload,
130	        abort_callback=cleanup_prepared_qwen3_tts_request,
131	    )
132	
133	
134	def create_sglang_tts_engine_executor(
135	    model_path: str,
136	    *,
137	    device: str = "cuda:0",
138	    gpu_id: int | None = None,
139	    dtype: str = "bfloat16",
140	    attn_implementation: str | None = None,
141	    server_args_overrides: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
142	) -> Any:
143	    from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.engine_builder import Qwen3TtsEngineBuilder
144	
145	    return Qwen3TtsEngineBuilder(
146	        attn_implementation=attn_implementation,
147	    ).build(
148	        model_path,
149	        device=device,
150	        gpu_id=gpu_id,
151	        dtype=dtype,
152	        server_args_overrides=server_args_overrides,
153	    )
154	
155	
156	create_tts_engine_executor = create_sglang_tts_engine_executor
157	
158	
159	class _Qwen3TTSVocoder(BatchVocoderBase):
160	    def __init__(self, tokenizer: Any) -> None:
161	        self._tokenizer = tokenizer
162	
163	    def prepare_item(self, payload: StagePayload) -> tuple[Qwen3TTSState, torch.Tensor]:
164	        state = load_state(payload)
165	        if state.audio_codes is None:
166	            raise RuntimeError("Qwen3-TTS vocoder requires audio_codes from tts_engine")
167	
168	        codes = torch.as_tensor(state.audio_codes, dtype=torch.long)
169	        return state, codes
170	
171	    async def decode_batch(
172	        self, items: list[tuple[Qwen3TTSState, torch.Tensor]]
173	    ) -> list[tuple[Any, int]]:
174	        wavs, sample_rate = self._tokenizer.decode(
175	            [{"audio_codes": codes} for _, codes in items]
176	        )
177	        if len(wavs) != len(items):
178	            raise RuntimeError(
179	                f"Qwen3-TTS speech tokenizer returned {len(wavs)} audios for {len(items)} requests"
180	            )
181	        return [(wav, sample_rate) for wav in wavs]
182	
183	    def store_result(
184	        self,
185	        payload: StagePayload,
186	        state: Qwen3TTSState,
187	        wav: Any,
188	        sample_rate: int,
189	    ) -> StagePayload:
190	        if wav is None:
191	            raise RuntimeError("Qwen3-TTS speech tokenizer did not return audio")
192	
193	        if state.ref_code_len:
194	            total_len = len(state.audio_codes)
195	            cut = int(state.ref_code_len / max(total_len, 1) * wav.shape[0])
196	            wav = wav[cut:]
197	        audio_payload = audio_waveform_payload(wav, source_hint="Qwen3-TTS")
198	        state.audio_samples = None
199	        state.sample_rate = int(sample_rate)
200	        state.audio_codes = None
201	
202	        payload = store_state(payload, state)
203	        payload.data.update(audio_payload)
204	        payload.data["sample_rate"] = state.sample_rate
205	        payload.data["modality"] = "audio"
206	        usage = build_usage(state)
207	        if usage is not None:
208	            payload.data["usage"] = usage
209	        return payload
210	
211	
212	def create_vocoder_executor(
213	    model_path: str,
214	    *,
215	    device: str = "cuda:0",
216	    gpu_id: int | None = None,
217	    dtype: str = "bfloat16",
218	    attn_implementation: str | None = None,
219	    max_batch_size: int = 8,
220	    max_batch_wait_ms: int = 2,
221	) -> SimpleScheduler:
222	    if gpu_id is not None:
223	        device = f"cuda:{gpu_id}"
224	    tokenizer = _load_qwen3_tts_tokenizer(
225	        model_path,
226	        device=device,
227	        dtype=dtype,
228	        attn_implementation=attn_implementation,
229	    )
230	
231	    return _Qwen3TTSVocoder(tokenizer).build_scheduler(
232	        max_batch_size=max_batch_size,
233	        max_batch_wait_ms=max_batch_wait_ms,
234	    )
235

1	# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
2	"""Qwen3-TTS pipeline state."""
3	
4	from __future__ import annotations
5	
6	from dataclasses import dataclass
7	from typing import Any
8	
9	from sglang_omni.scheduling.pipeline_state import DeclarativeStateBase, wire
10	
11	
12	@dataclass
13	class Qwen3TTSState(DeclarativeStateBase):
14	    """Per-request state for Qwen3-TTS generation."""
15	
16	    sample_rate: int = wire(24000, codec="int")
17	
18	    text: str = wire("", codec="str")
19	    task_type: str = wire("Base", codec="str_or")
20	    task_type_explicit: bool = wire(False, codec="bool")
21	    language: str = wire("auto", codec="str_or")
22	    voice: str | None = None
23	    instructions: str | None = None
24	    ref_audio: Any | None = None
25	    ref_text: str | None = None
26	    uploaded_voice_name: str | None = None
27	    uploaded_voice_created_at: int | None = None

# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
"""Qwen3-TTS pipeline state."""

from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Any

from sglang_omni.scheduling.pipeline_state import DeclarativeStateBase, wire


@dataclass
class Qwen3TTSState(DeclarativeStateBase):
    """Per-request state for Qwen3-TTS generation."""

    sample_rate: int = wire(24000, codec="int")

    text: str = wire("", codec="str")
    task_type: str = wire("Base", codec="str_or")
    task_type_explicit: bool = wire(False, codec="bool")
    language: str = wire("auto", codec="str_or")
    voice: str | None = None
    instructions: str | None = None
    ref_audio: Any | None = None
    ref_text: str | None = None
    uploaded_voice_name: str | None = None
    uploaded_voice_created_at: int | None = None
    x_vector_only_mode: bool = wire(False, codec="bool")
    non_streaming_mode: bool = wire(False, codec="bool")
    generation_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = wire(default_factory=dict, codec="dict")
    seed: int | None = None
    audio_codes: Any | None = wire(None, codec="tensor_list")
    ref_code_len: int = wire(0, emit="truthy", codec="int")
    audio_samples: Any | None = wire(None, codec="tensor_list")

1	# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
2	"""Request mapping helpers for Qwen3-TTS."""
3	
4	from __future__ import annotations
5	
6	import hashlib
7	import json
8	import threading
9	import time
10	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
11	from typing import Any
12	
13	import torch
14	
15	from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_omni.pending_text_queue import PendingTextTensorQueue
16	from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.payload_types import Qwen3TTSState
17	from sglang_omni.preprocessing.cache_key import hash_bytes as _hash_bytes
18	from sglang_omni.preprocessing.cache_key import (
19	    reference_path_cache_key as _reference_path_cache_key,
20	)
21	from sglang_omni.proto import StagePayload
22	from sglang_omni.sampling.seed import (
23	    SAMPLING_SEED_MASK,
24	    derive_sampling_seed,
25	    new_random_sampling_seed,
26	)
27	from sglang_omni.scheduling.reference_encoder import (
28	    KeyedReferenceEncodeHook,
29	    ReferenceEncodeService,
30	)
31	from sglang_omni.scheduling.sglang_backend import SGLangARRequestData
32	from sglang_omni.scheduling.speaker_cache import (
33	    SpeakerCacheKey,
34	    get_speaker_artifact_cache,
35	)
36	from sglang_omni.utils.audio_payload import audio_data_uri_from_reference
37	
38	QWEN3_TTS_DEFAULT_MAX_NEW_TOKENS = 2048
39	QWEN3_TTS_TASK_BASE = "Base"
40	QWEN3_TTS_TASK_CUSTOM_VOICE = "CustomVoice"
41	QWEN3_TTS_TASK_VOICE_DESIGN = "VoiceDesign"
42	QWEN3_TTS_DEFAULT_CUSTOM_VOICE = "Vivian"
43	_QWEN3_TTS_PREPARED_MARKER = "_qwen3_tts_prepared_request"
44	
45	_GENERATION_FIELDS = (
46	    "do_sample",
47	    "temperature",
48	    "top_p",
49	    "top_k",
50	    "repetition_penalty",
51	    "subtalker_dosample",
52	    "subtalker_temperature",
53	    "subtalker_top_p",
54	    "subtalker_top_k",
55	    "max_new_tokens",
56	)
57	
58	_IMPLICIT_SAMPLING_DEFAULTS = {
59	    "temperature": {1.0, 0.8},
60	    "top_p": {1.0, 0.8},
61	    "top_k": {-1, 30},
62	    "repetition_penalty": {1.0, 1.1},
63	}
64	
65	_QWEN3_TTS_SAMPLING_SEED_MASK = SAMPLING_SEED_MASK
66	
67	
68	def _new_qwen3_tts_sampling_seed() -> int:
69	    return new_random_sampling_seed()
70	
71	
72	def _normalize_qwen3_tts_seed(seed: Any) -> int:
73	    if isinstance(seed, bool):
74	        raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS seed must be an integer")
75	    if isinstance(seed, float) and not seed.is_integer():
76	        raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS seed must be an integer")
77	    try:
78	        normalized = int(seed)
79	    except (TypeError, ValueError) as exc:
80	        raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS seed must be an integer") from exc
81	    return normalized & _QWEN3_TTS_SAMPLING_SEED_MASK
82	
83	
84	def _derive_qwen3_tts_child_seed(seed: int, label: str) -> int:
85	    return derive_sampling_seed("qwen3-tts", seed, label)
86	
87	
88	def derive_qwen3_tts_sampling_seeds(seed: int) -> tuple[int, int]:
89	    """Split a public request seed into semantic and subtalker sampling seeds."""
90	
91	    normalized = _normalize_qwen3_tts_seed(seed)
92	    return (
93	        _derive_qwen3_tts_child_seed(normalized, "semantic"),
94	        _derive_qwen3_tts_child_seed(normalized, "subtalker"),
95	    )
96	
97	
98	@dataclass
99	class Qwen3TTSSGLangRequestData(SGLangARRequestData):
100	    """Qwen3-TTS scheduler-owned request state."""
101	
102	    enforce_request_limits: bool = True
103	    output_codes: list[torch.Tensor] = field(default_factory=list)
104	    ref_code: torch.Tensor | None = None
105	    ref_code_len: int = 0
106	    prompt_input_embeds: torch.Tensor | None = None
107	    semantic_sampling_seed: int = field(default_factory=_new_qwen3_tts_sampling_seed)
108	    subtalker_dosample: bool = True
109	    subtalker_temperature: float = 0.9
110	    subtalker_top_p: float = 1.0
111	    subtalker_top_k: int = 50
112	    subtalker_sampling_seed: int = field(default_factory=_new_qwen3_tts_sampling_seed)
113	    engine_start_s: float = 0.0
114	
115	
116	@dataclass
117	class Qwen3TTSPreparedRequest:
118	    """Heavy Qwen3-TTS preprocessing output consumed by the AR scheduler."""
119	
120	    state: Qwen3TTSState
121	    input_ids_list: list[int]
122	    input_ids: torch.Tensor
123	    attention_mask: torch.Tensor
124	    trailing_text_hidden: torch.Tensor
125	    ref_code: torch.Tensor | None
126	    prompt_input_embeds: torch.Tensor
127	    tts_pad_embed: torch.Tensor
128	    gen_kwargs: dict[str, Any]
129	
130	
131	@dataclass
132	class Qwen3TTSPreprocessingContext:
133	    model: Any
134	    wrapper: Any
135	
136	
137	_PREPROCESSING_CONTEXT: Qwen3TTSPreprocessingContext | None = None
138	_PREPARED_REQUESTS: dict[str, Qwen3TTSPreparedRequest] = {}
139	_ADHOC_REFERENCE_SERVICE_ENTRY: (
140	    tuple[tuple[int, int], ReferenceEncodeService] | None
141	) = None
142	_PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK = threading.Lock()
143	
144	
145	def set_qwen3_tts_preprocessing_context(*, model: Any, wrapper: Any) -> None:
146	    """Register model objects used by the preprocessing stage."""
147	
148	    global _PREPROCESSING_CONTEXT
149	    with _PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
150	        _get_qwen3_tts_adhoc_reference_service_locked(model, wrapper)
151	        _PREPROCESSING_CONTEXT = Qwen3TTSPreprocessingContext(
152	            model=model,
153	            wrapper=wrapper,
154	        )
155	        _PREPARED_REQUESTS.clear()
156	
157	
158	def clear_qwen3_tts_preprocessing_context() -> None:
159	    """Clear Qwen3-TTS preprocessing globals, mainly for tests and reloads."""
160	
161	    global _ADHOC_REFERENCE_SERVICE_ENTRY
162	    global _PREPROCESSING_CONTEXT
163	    with _PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
164	        _PREPROCESSING_CONTEXT = None
165	        _ADHOC_REFERENCE_SERVICE_ENTRY = None
166	        _PREPARED_REQUESTS.clear()
167	
168	
169	def _prepared_request_id(payload: StagePayload) -> str | None:
170	    data = payload.data
171	    if not isinstance(data, dict):
172	        return None
173	    marker = data.get(_QWEN3_TTS_PREPARED_MARKER)
174	    return str(marker) if marker is not None else None
175	
176	
177	def pop_prepared_qwen3_tts_request(
178	    payload: StagePayload,
179	) -> Qwen3TTSPreparedRequest | None:
180	    """Consume the prepared request referenced by a preprocessed payload."""
181	
182	    prepared_request_id = _prepared_request_id(payload)
183	    if prepared_request_id is None:
184	        return None
185	    with _PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
186	        prepared = _PREPARED_REQUESTS.pop(prepared_request_id, None)
187	    if prepared is None:
188	        raise RuntimeError(
189	            "Qwen3-TTS preprocessing state is missing for prepared payload "
190	            f"{prepared_request_id!r}; the AR scheduler must not rebuild it"
191	        )
192	    return prepared
193	
194	
195	def cleanup_prepared_qwen3_tts_request(request_id: str) -> None:
196	    """Drop any prepared Qwen3-TTS handoff state for an aborted request."""
197	
198	    with _PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
199	        _PREPARED_REQUESTS.pop(str(request_id), None)
200	
201	
202	def build_qwen3_tts_state(payload: StagePayload) -> Qwen3TTSState:
203	    inputs = payload.request.inputs or {}
204	    params = payload.request.params or {}
205	    metadata = payload.request.metadata or {}
206	    tts_params = metadata.get("tts_params")
207	    if not isinstance(tts_params, dict):
208	        tts_params = {}
209	
210	    text, references = normalize_qwen3_tts_inputs(inputs)
211	    has_reference = has_voice_clone_reference(references, tts_params)
212	    task_type_raw = tts_params.get("task_type") or params.get("task_type")
213	    task_type_explicit = task_type_raw is not None and str(task_type_raw).strip() != ""
214	    task_type = normalize_qwen3_tts_task_type(
215	        task_type_raw, has_reference=has_reference
216	    )
217	    language = normalize_language(tts_params.get("language") or params.get("language"))
218	    instructions = resolve_optional_text(
219	        tts_params.get("instructions")
220	        or tts_params.get("instruct")
221	        or params.get("instructions")
222	        or params.get("instruct")
223	    )
224	    ref_audio = None
225	    ref_text = None
226	    x_vector_only_mode = False
227	    non_streaming_mode = resolve_non_streaming_mode(
228	        task_type=task_type,
229	        params=params,
230	        tts_params=tts_params,
231	    )
232	    voice = normalize_qwen3_tts_voice(
233	        tts_params.get("voice") or tts_params.get("speaker") or params.get("voice")
234	    )
235	
236	    if task_type == QWEN3_TTS_TASK_BASE:
237	        ref_audio, ref_text = resolve_voice_clone_reference(references, tts_params)
238	        x_vector_only_mode = resolve_x_vector_only_mode(
239	            params=params,
240	            tts_params=tts_params,
241	            ref_text=ref_text,
242	        )
243	        if not x_vector_only_mode and not ref_text:
244	            raise ValueError(
245	                "Qwen3-TTS Base requires non-empty ref_text unless "
246	                "x_vector_only_mode is enabled"
247	            )
248	    elif task_type == QWEN3_TTS_TASK_CUSTOM_VOICE:
249	        if has_param(tts_params, params, "ref_audio") or references_contain_audio(
250	            references
251	        ):
252	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS CustomVoice does not accept ref_audio")
253	        if has_param(tts_params, params, "ref_text") or references_contain_text(
254	            references
255	        ):
256	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS CustomVoice does not accept ref_text")
257	        if has_param(tts_params, params, "x_vector_only_mode"):
258	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS CustomVoice does not accept x_vector_only_mode")
259	        voice = voice or QWEN3_TTS_DEFAULT_CUSTOM_VOICE
260	        non_streaming_mode = True
261	    elif task_type == QWEN3_TTS_TASK_VOICE_DESIGN:
262	        if has_param(tts_params, params, "ref_audio") or references_contain_audio(
263	            references
264	        ):
265	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS VoiceDesign does not accept ref_audio")
266	        if has_param(tts_params, params, "ref_text") or references_contain_text(
267	            references
268	        ):
269	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS VoiceDesign does not accept ref_text")
270	        if has_param(tts_params, params, "x_vector_only_mode"):
271	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS VoiceDesign does not accept x_vector_only_mode")
272	        if not instructions:
273	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS VoiceDesign requires instructions")
274	        voice = None
275	        non_streaming_mode = True
276	    else:
277	        raise AssertionError(f"unhandled Qwen3-TTS task type: {task_type}")
278	
279	    seed = tts_params["seed"] if "seed" in tts_params else params.get("seed")
280	    normalized_seed = _normalize_qwen3_tts_seed(seed) if seed is not None else None
281	
282	    return Qwen3TTSState(
283	        text=text,
284	        task_type=task_type,
285	        task_type_explicit=task_type_explicit,
286	        language=language,
287	        voice=voice,
288	        instructions=instructions,
289	        ref_audio=ref_audio,
290	        ref_text=ref_text,
291	        uploaded_voice_name=resolve_optional_text(
292	            tts_params.get("uploaded_voice_name")
293	        ),
294	        uploaded_voice_created_at=(
295	            int(tts_params["uploaded_voice_created_at"])
296	            if tts_params.get("uploaded_voice_created_at") is not None
297	            else None
298	        ),
299	        x_vector_only_mode=x_vector_only_mode,
300	        non_streaming_mode=non_streaming_mode,
301	        generation_kwargs=build_generation_kwargs(params, tts_params=tts_params),
302	        seed=normalized_seed,
303	    )
304	
305	
306	def normalize_qwen3_tts_inputs(inputs: Any) -> tuple[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]:
307	    if isinstance(inputs, str):
308	        return inputs, []
309	    if isinstance(inputs, dict):
310	        text = inputs.get("text", inputs.get("input", ""))
311	        references = inputs.get("references") or []
312	        if not isinstance(references, list):
313	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS references must be a list")
314	        normalized_references = [
315	            dict(reference) for reference in references if isinstance(reference, dict)
316	        ]
317	        return str(text), normalized_references
318	    return str(inputs) if inputs is not None else "", []
319	
320	
321	def resolve_voice_clone_reference(
322	    references: list[dict[str, Any]],
323	    tts_params: dict[str, Any],
324	) -> tuple[Any, str | None]:
325	    reference = references[0] if references else {}
326	    ref_audio = (
327	        reference.get("audio_path")
328	        or reference.get("ref_audio")
329	        or reference.get("audio")
330	        or audio_data_uri_from_reference(reference)
331	        or tts_params.get("ref_audio")
332	    )
333	    ref_text = reference.get("text") or tts_params.get("ref_text")
334	    if ref_audio is None:
335	        raise ValueError(
336	            "Qwen3-TTS Base requires reference audio via ref_audio or references[0].audio_path"
337	        )
338	    return ref_audio, str(ref_text) if ref_text is not None else None
339	
340	
341	def has_voice_clone_reference(
342	    references: list[dict[str, Any]],
343	    tts_params: dict[str, Any],
344	) -> bool:
345	    if references_contain_audio(references) or references_contain_text(references):
346	        return True
347	    return (
348	        tts_params.get("ref_audio") is not None
349	        or tts_params.get("ref_text") is not None
350	    )
351	
352	
353	def references_contain_audio(references: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> bool:
354	    return any(
355	        reference.get(key) is not None
356	        for reference in references
357	        for key in ("audio_path", "ref_audio", "audio", "data")
358	    )
359	
360	
361	def references_contain_text(references: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> bool:
362	    return any(reference.get("text") is not None for reference in references)
363	
364	
365	def normalize_qwen3_tts_task_type(
366	    task_type: Any,
367	    *,
368	    has_reference: bool,
369	) -> str:
370	    if task_type is None or str(task_type).strip() == "":
371	        return QWEN3_TTS_TASK_BASE if has_reference else QWEN3_TTS_TASK_CUSTOM_VOICE
372	    normalized = str(task_type).replace("_", "").replace("-", "").lower()
373	    if normalized == "base":
374	        return QWEN3_TTS_TASK_BASE
375	    if normalized == "customvoice":
376	        return QWEN3_TTS_TASK_CUSTOM_VOICE
377	    if normalized == "voicedesign":
378	        return QWEN3_TTS_TASK_VOICE_DESIGN
379	    raise ValueError(
380	        "Qwen3-TTS task_type must be one of Base, CustomVoice, or VoiceDesign"
381	    )
382	
383	
384	def resolve_optional_text(value: Any) -> str | None:
385	    if value is None:
386	        return None
387	    text = str(value).strip()
388	    return text or None
389	
390	
391	def normalize_qwen3_tts_voice(value: Any) -> str | None:
392	    voice = resolve_optional_text(value)
393	    if voice is None or voice.lower() == "default":
394	        return None
395	    return voice
396	
397	
398	def has_param(
399	    tts_params: dict[str, Any],
400	    params: dict[str, Any],
401	    name: str,
402	) -> bool:
403	    return name in tts_params or name in params
404	
405	
406	def resolve_non_streaming_mode(
407	    *,
408	    task_type: str,
409	    params: dict[str, Any],
410	    tts_params: dict[str, Any],
411	) -> bool:
412	    for source in (params, tts_params):
413	        if "non_streaming_mode" in source:
414	            return bool(source["non_streaming_mode"])
415	    return task_type in (QWEN3_TTS_TASK_CUSTOM_VOICE, QWEN3_TTS_TASK_VOICE_DESIGN)
416	
417	
418	def normalize_language(language: Any) -> str:
419	    if language is None or language == "":
420	        return "auto"
421	    return str(language)
422	
423	
424	def resolve_x_vector_only_mode(
425	    *,
426	    params: dict[str, Any],
427	    tts_params: dict[str, Any],
428	    ref_text: str | None,
429	) -> bool:
430	    for source in (params, tts_params):
431	        if "x_vector_only_mode" in source:
432	            return bool(source["x_vector_only_mode"])
433	    return not bool(ref_text)
434	
435	
436	def build_generation_kwargs(
437	    params: dict[str, Any],
438	    *,
439	    tts_params: dict[str, Any],
440	) -> dict[str, Any]:
441	    explicit_generation_params = tts_params.get("explicit_generation_params")
442	    if isinstance(explicit_generation_params, (list, tuple, set)):
443	        explicit_fields = {str(field) for field in explicit_generation_params}
444	    else:
445	        explicit_fields = set()
446	
447	    selected_fields = set()
448	    for field in _GENERATION_FIELDS:
449	        value = params.get(field)
450	        if value is None:
451	            continue
452	        if field in _IMPLICIT_SAMPLING_DEFAULTS and field not in explicit_fields:
453	            if value in _IMPLICIT_SAMPLING_DEFAULTS[field]:
454	                continue
455	        selected_fields.add(field)
456	
457	    max_new_tokens = params.get("max_new_tokens")
458	    if max_new_tokens is None:
459	        max_new_tokens = QWEN3_TTS_DEFAULT_MAX_NEW_TOKENS
460	    generation_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {"max_new_tokens": int(max_new_tokens)}
461	    for field in _GENERATION_FIELDS:
462	        if field == "max_new_tokens":
463	            continue
464	        if field in selected_fields and params.get(field) is not None:
465	            generation_kwargs[field] = params[field]
466	    return generation_kwargs
467	
468	
469	def build_embedding_cache_key_ids(input_embeds: torch.Tensor) -> list[int]:
470	    """Build stable radix-cache token ids for a precomputed embedding prefix."""
471	    rows = input_embeds.detach().to(dtype=torch.float32, device="cpu")
472	    key_ids: list[int] = []
473	    for row in rows:
474	        digest = hashlib.blake2b(row.numpy().tobytes(), digest_size=8).digest()
475	        key_ids.append(int.from_bytes(digest, "little") & ((1 << 63) - 1))
476	    return key_ids
477	
478	
479	def _build_qwen3_tts_pad_embed(model: Any) -> torch.Tensor:
480	    feedback_buffer = model.model._feedback_buffer
481	    with torch.no_grad():
482	        return (
483	            model.text_projection(
484	                model.get_text_embeddings()(
485	                    torch.tensor(
486	                        [[model.root_config.tts_pad_token_id]],
487	                        device=model.device,
488	                        dtype=torch.long,
489	                    )
490	                )
491	            )
492	            .squeeze(0)
493	            .squeeze(0)
494	            .detach()
495	            .to(device=feedback_buffer.device, dtype=feedback_buffer.dtype)
496	        )
497	
498	
499	def _build_instruct_id(wrapper: Any, instructions: str | None) -> torch.Tensor | None:
500	    if not instructions:
501	        return None
502	    if hasattr(wrapper, "_build_instruct_text"):
503	        instruct_text = wrapper._build_instruct_text(instructions)
504	    else:
505	        instruct_text = f"<|im_start|>user\n{instructions}<|im_end|>\n"
506	    return wrapper._tokenize_texts([instruct_text])[0]
507	
508	
509	def _qwen3_tts_uploaded_voice_cache_key(state: Qwen3TTSState) -> SpeakerCacheKey | None:
510	    if state.uploaded_voice_name is None or state.uploaded_voice_created_at is None:
511	        return None
512	    mode = "xvec" if state.x_vector_only_mode else "icl"
513	    return SpeakerCacheKey(
514	        model_type=f"qwen3_tts_{mode}",
515	        voice_name=state.uploaded_voice_name,
516	        voice_version=int(state.uploaded_voice_created_at),
517	        artifact_kind="voice_clone_prompt",
518	    )
519	
520	
521	def _cacheable_qwen3_tts_voice_prompt(
522	    voice_clone_prompt: dict[str, Any],
523	    *,
524	    ref_text: str | None,
525	) -> dict[str, Any]:
526	    ref_codes = voice_clone_prompt.get("ref_code")
527	    artifact: dict[str, Any] = {
528	        "artifact_type": "qwen3_tts_voice_clone_prompt",
529	        "ref_spk_embedding": tuple(
530	            _cacheable_qwen3_tts_tensor(embedding)
531	            for embedding in voice_clone_prompt["ref_spk_embedding"]
532	        ),
533	        "icl_mode": tuple(bool(value) for value in voice_clone_prompt["icl_mode"]),
534	        "ref_text": ref_text,
535	    }
536	    if ref_codes is not None and all(code is not None for code in ref_codes):
537	        artifact["ref_code"] = tuple(
538	            _cacheable_qwen3_tts_tensor(code) for code in ref_codes
539	        )
540	    return artifact
541	
542	
543	def _cacheable_qwen3_tts_tensor(value: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
544	    return value.detach().to(device="cpu").clone()

547	def _qwen3_tts_voice_prompt_from_cache(
548	    artifact: dict[str, Any],
549	) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], str | None] | None:
550	    if artifact.get("artifact_type") != "qwen3_tts_voice_clone_prompt":
551	        return None
552	    prompt: dict[str, Any] = {
553	        "ref_spk_embedding": [
554	            embedding.detach().clone() for embedding in artifact["ref_spk_embedding"]
555	        ],
556	        "icl_mode": list(artifact["icl_mode"]),
557	    }
558	    if "ref_code" in artifact:
559	        prompt["ref_code"] = [code.detach().clone() for code in artifact["ref_code"]]
560	    ref_text = artifact.get("ref_text")
561	    return prompt, str(ref_text) if ref_text is not None else None

564	@dataclass(frozen=True)
565	class _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceInput:
566	    ref_audio: Any
567	    ref_text: str | None
568	    x_vector_only_mode: bool
569	
570	
571	class _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceHook(
572	    KeyedReferenceEncodeHook[
573	        _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceInput,
574	        tuple[dict[str, Any], str | None],
575	        dict[str, Any],
576	    ]
577	):
578	    model_id = "qwen3_tts"
579	    encoder_id = "qwen3_tts_voice_clone_prompt"
580	    artifact_kind = "qwen3_tts_voice_clone_prompt_adhoc"
581	
582	    def __init__(self, *, model: Any, wrapper: Any) -> None:
583	        self._model = model
584	        self._wrapper = wrapper
585	        self.model_revision = _qwen3_tts_model_revision(model, wrapper)
586	        self.encoder_config_hash = _qwen3_tts_encoder_config_hash(model, wrapper)
587	
588	    def normalize_input(self, raw_input: Any) -> _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceInput:
589	        if isinstance(raw_input, _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceInput):
590	            return raw_input
591	        if not isinstance(raw_input, Qwen3TTSState):
592	            raise TypeError("Qwen3-TTS ad-hoc reference input must be a state")
593	        return _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceInput(
594	            ref_audio=raw_input.ref_audio,
595	            ref_text=raw_input.ref_text,
596	            x_vector_only_mode=raw_input.x_vector_only_mode,
597	        )
598	
599	    def input_key(self, item: _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceInput) -> str | None:
600	        return _qwen3_tts_ref_audio_input_key(item.ref_audio)
601	
602	    def options_key(self, item: _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceInput) -> str:
603	        return json.dumps(
604	            {
605	                "ref_text": item.ref_text,
606	                "x_vector_only_mode": bool(item.x_vector_only_mode),
607	            },
608	            sort_keys=True,
609	            separators=(",", ":"),
610	        )
611	
612	    def encode_one(
613	        self, item: _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceInput
614	    ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], str | None]:
615	        with torch.no_grad():
616	            prompt_items = self._wrapper.create_voice_clone_prompt(
617	                ref_audio=item.ref_audio,
618	                ref_text=item.ref_text,
619	                x_vector_only_mode=item.x_vector_only_mode,
620	            )
621	        if len(prompt_items) != 1:
622	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS expects exactly one voice-clone prompt")
623	        voice_clone_prompt = self._wrapper._prompt_items_to_voice_clone_prompt(
624	            prompt_items
625	        )
626	        return voice_clone_prompt, prompt_items[0].ref_text
627	
628	    def store_artifact(self, artifact: tuple[dict[str, Any], str | None]) -> dict:
629	        voice_clone_prompt, ref_text = artifact
630	        return _cacheable_qwen3_tts_voice_prompt(
631	            voice_clone_prompt,
632	            ref_text=ref_text,
633	        )
634	
635	    def load_artifact(
636	        self, stored: dict[str, Any]
637	    ) -> tuple[dict[str, Any], str | None]:
638	        cached_prompt = _qwen3_tts_voice_prompt_from_cache(stored)
639	        if cached_prompt is None:
640	            raise RuntimeError("Qwen3-TTS ad-hoc reference cache entry is invalid")
641	        return cached_prompt
642	
643	
644	def _qwen3_tts_ref_audio_input_key(ref_audio: Any) -> str | None:
645	    if isinstance(ref_audio, str):
646	        if ref_audio.startswith("data:"):
647	            return f"data:{_hash_bytes(ref_audio.encode('utf-8'))}"
648	        return _reference_path_cache_key(ref_audio, trust_stat=False)
649	    if isinstance(ref_audio, bytes | bytearray | memoryview):
650	        return f"bytes:{_hash_bytes(ref_audio)}"
651	    if isinstance(ref_audio, dict):
652	        data_uri = audio_data_uri_from_reference(ref_audio)
653	        if data_uri is not None:
654	            return f"data:{_hash_bytes(data_uri.encode('utf-8'))}"
655	    return None

657	
658	def _qwen3_tts_model_revision(model: Any, wrapper: Any) -> str:
659	    processor = getattr(wrapper, "processor", None)
660	    candidates = (
661	        getattr(model, "name_or_path", None),
662	        getattr(getattr(model, "config", None), "_name_or_path", None),
663	        getattr(getattr(model, "config", None), "name_or_path", None),
664	        getattr(processor, "name_or_path", None),
665	        getattr(processor, "_name_or_path", None),
666	    )
667	    for candidate in candidates:
668	        if candidate:
669	            return str(candidate)
670	    return type(model).__module__ + "." + type(model).__qualname__
671	
672	
673	def _qwen3_tts_encoder_config_hash(model: Any, wrapper: Any) -> str:
674	    processor = getattr(wrapper, "processor", None)
675	    parts = [
676	        type(model).__module__ + "." + type(model).__qualname__,
677	        type(wrapper).__module__ + "." + type(wrapper).__qualname__,
678	        type(processor).__module__ + "." + type(processor).__qualname__,
679	        str(getattr(processor, "name_or_path", "")),
680	        str(getattr(processor, "_name_or_path", "")),
681	    ]
682	    return _hash_bytes("|".join(parts).encode("utf-8"))
683	
684	
685	def _get_qwen3_tts_adhoc_reference_service_locked(
686	    model: Any,
687	    wrapper: Any,
688	) -> ReferenceEncodeService:
689	    global _ADHOC_REFERENCE_SERVICE_ENTRY
690	    owner = (id(model), id(wrapper))
691	    entry = _ADHOC_REFERENCE_SERVICE_ENTRY
692	    if entry is None or entry[0] != owner:
693	        service = ReferenceEncodeService(
694	            _Qwen3TTSAdhocReferenceHook(model=model, wrapper=wrapper),
695	            max_items=256,
696	            max_bytes=64 * 1024 * 1024,
697	            timeout_s=130.0,
698	            log_prefix="Qwen3-TTS ad-hoc reference",
699	        )
700	        entry = (owner, service)
701	        _ADHOC_REFERENCE_SERVICE_ENTRY = entry
702	    return entry[1]
703

705	def _get_qwen3_tts_adhoc_reference_service(
706	    model: Any,
707	    wrapper: Any,
708	) -> ReferenceEncodeService:
709	    with _PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
710	        return _get_qwen3_tts_adhoc_reference_service_locked(model, wrapper)

713	def _normalized_model_type(model: Any) -> str:
714	    model_type = getattr(model, "tts_model_type", None)
715	    if model_type is None:
716	        model_type = getattr(
717	            getattr(model, "root_config", None), "tts_model_type", None
718	        )
719	    normalized = str(model_type or "base").replace("-", "_").strip().lower()
720	    if normalized == "customvoice":
721	        return "custom_voice"
722	    if normalized == "voicedesign":
723	        return "voice_design"
724	    return normalized
725	
726	
727	def _validate_qwen3_tts_model_task(model: Any, state: Qwen3TTSState) -> None:
728	    model_type = _normalized_model_type(model)
729	    if model_type == "base" and state.task_type != QWEN3_TTS_TASK_BASE:
730	        if not state.task_type_explicit:
731	            raise ValueError(
732	                "Qwen3-TTS Base requires ref_audio or speaker_embedding; "
733	                "text-only requests require a CustomVoice or VoiceDesign checkpoint"
734	            )
735	        raise ValueError(
736	            f"Qwen3-TTS Base checkpoint does not support {state.task_type}"
737	        )
738	    if model_type == "custom_voice" and state.task_type != QWEN3_TTS_TASK_CUSTOM_VOICE:
739	        raise ValueError(
740	            f"Qwen3-TTS CustomVoice checkpoint does not support {state.task_type}"
741	        )
742	    if model_type == "voice_design" and state.task_type != QWEN3_TTS_TASK_VOICE_DESIGN:
743	        raise ValueError(
744	            f"Qwen3-TTS VoiceDesign checkpoint does not support {state.task_type}"
745	        )

748	def _prepare_qwen3_tts_base_request(
749	    *,
750	    state: Qwen3TTSState,
751	    model: Any,
752	    wrapper: Any,
753	) -> tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor | None]:
754	    speaker_cache = get_speaker_artifact_cache()
755	    cache_key = _qwen3_tts_uploaded_voice_cache_key(state)
756	    cached_artifact = speaker_cache.get(cache_key) if cache_key is not None else None
757	    cached_prompt = (
758	        _qwen3_tts_voice_prompt_from_cache(cached_artifact)
759	        if isinstance(cached_artifact, dict)
760	        else None
761	    )
762	    if cached_prompt is not None:
763	        voice_clone_prompt, ref_text = cached_prompt
764	    elif cache_key is None:
765	        reference_service = _get_qwen3_tts_adhoc_reference_service(model, wrapper)
766	        voice_clone_prompt, ref_text = reference_service.get_or_encode(
767	            state,
768	            desc="Qwen3-TTS ad-hoc reference",
769	        )
770	    else:
771	        with torch.no_grad():
772	            prompt_items = wrapper.create_voice_clone_prompt(
773	                ref_audio=state.ref_audio,
774	                ref_text=state.ref_text,
775	                x_vector_only_mode=state.x_vector_only_mode,
776	            )
777	        if len(prompt_items) != 1:
778	            raise ValueError("Qwen3-TTS expects exactly one voice-clone prompt")
779	        voice_clone_prompt = wrapper._prompt_items_to_voice_clone_prompt(prompt_items)
780	        ref_text = prompt_items[0].ref_text
781	        speaker_cache.put(
782	            cache_key,
783	            _cacheable_qwen3_tts_voice_prompt(
784	                voice_clone_prompt,
785	                ref_text=ref_text,
786	            ),
787	        )
788	
789	    input_id = wrapper._tokenize_texts([wrapper._build_assistant_text(state.text)])[0]
790	    ref_id = (
791	        wrapper._tokenize_texts([wrapper._build_ref_text(ref_text)])[0]
792	        if ref_text
793	        else None
794	    )
795	    instruct_id = _build_instruct_id(wrapper, state.instructions)
796	    with torch.no_grad():
797	        return model.build_voice_clone_inputs(
798	            input_id=input_id,
799	            ref_id=ref_id,
800	            voice_clone_prompt=voice_clone_prompt,
801	            language=state.language,
802	            non_streaming_mode=state.non_streaming_mode,
803	            instruct_id=instruct_id,
804	        )

842	def _prepare_qwen3_tts_request(
843	    payload: StagePayload,
844	    *,
845	    model: Any,
846	    wrapper: Any,
847	) -> Qwen3TTSPreparedRequest:
848	    state = build_qwen3_tts_state(payload)
849	
850	    _validate_qwen3_tts_model_task(model, state)
851	    gen_kwargs = wrapper._merge_generate_kwargs(**state.generation_kwargs)
852	    if state.task_type == QWEN3_TTS_TASK_BASE:
853	        (
854	            input_embeds,
855	            attention_mask,
856	            trailing_text_hidden,
857	            ref_code,
858	        ) = _prepare_qwen3_tts_base_request(
859	            state=state,
860	            model=model,
861	            wrapper=wrapper,
862	        )
863	    elif state.task_type == QWEN3_TTS_TASK_CUSTOM_VOICE:
864	        (
865	            input_embeds,
866	            attention_mask,
867	            trailing_text_hidden,
868	            ref_code,
869	        ) = _prepare_qwen3_tts_custom_voice_request(
870	            state=state,
871	            model=model,
872	            wrapper=wrapper,
873	        )
874	    elif state.task_type == QWEN3_TTS_TASK_VOICE_DESIGN:
875	        (
876	            input_embeds,
877	            attention_mask,
878	            trailing_text_hidden,
879	            ref_code,
880	        ) = _prepare_qwen3_tts_voice_design_request(
881	            state=state,
882	            model=model,
883	            wrapper=wrapper,
884	        )
885	    else:
886	        raise AssertionError(f"unhandled Qwen3-TTS task type: {state.task_type}")
887	
888	    feedback_buffer = model.model._feedback_buffer
889	    prompt_input_embeds = (
890	        input_embeds.squeeze(0)
891	        .detach()
892	        .to(
893	            device=feedback_buffer.device,
894	            dtype=feedback_buffer.dtype,
895	        )
896	    )
897	    input_ids_list = build_embedding_cache_key_ids(prompt_input_embeds)
898	    input_ids = torch.tensor(input_ids_list, dtype=torch.long)
899	    trailing_text_hidden = (
900	        trailing_text_hidden.squeeze(0)
901	        .detach()
902	        .to(
903	            device=feedback_buffer.device,
904	            dtype=feedback_buffer.dtype,
905	        )
906	    )
907	    if ref_code is not None:
908	        ref_code = ref_code.detach().to(device=feedback_buffer.device)
909	
910	    return Qwen3TTSPreparedRequest(
911	        state=state,
912	        input_ids_list=input_ids_list,
913	        input_ids=input_ids,
914	        attention_mask=attention_mask.detach(),
915	        trailing_text_hidden=trailing_text_hidden,
916	        ref_code=ref_code,
917	        prompt_input_embeds=prompt_input_embeds,
918	        tts_pad_embed=_build_qwen3_tts_pad_embed(model),
919	        gen_kwargs=gen_kwargs,
920	    )
921	
922	
923	def preprocess_qwen3_tts_payload(payload: StagePayload) -> StagePayload:
924	    """Run Qwen3-TTS prompt/audio preprocessing outside the AR scheduler."""
925	
926	    with _PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
927	        context = _PREPROCESSING_CONTEXT
928	    if context is None:
929	        raise RuntimeError(
930	            "Qwen3-TTS preprocessing context is not initialized; "
931	            "create_sglang_tts_engine_executor must register it before requests run"
932	        )
933	
934	    prepared = _prepare_qwen3_tts_request(
935	        payload,
936	        model=context.model,
937	        wrapper=context.wrapper,
938	    )
939	    with _PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
940	        _PREPARED_REQUESTS[payload.request_id] = prepared
941	
942	    data = prepared.state.to_dict()
943	    data[_QWEN3_TTS_PREPARED_MARKER] = payload.request_id
944	    return StagePayload(
945	        request_id=payload.request_id,
946	        request=payload.request,
947	        data=data,
948	    )
949	
950	
951	def build_sglang_qwen3_tts_request(
952	    payload: StagePayload,
953	    *,
954	    model: Any,
955	    wrapper: Any,
956	) -> Qwen3TTSSGLangRequestData:
957	    del wrapper
958	
959	    from sglang.srt.managers.schedule_batch import Req
960	    from sglang.srt.sampling.sampling_params import SamplingParams
961	
962	    prepared = pop_prepared_qwen3_tts_request(payload)
963	    if prepared is None:
964	        raise RuntimeError(
965	            "Qwen3-TTS AR request builder requires a payload prepared by "
966	            "preprocess_qwen3_tts_payload"
967	        )
968	
969	    gen_kwargs = prepared.gen_kwargs
970	    state = prepared.state
971	    do_sample = bool(gen_kwargs.get("do_sample", True))
972	    temperature = float(gen_kwargs.get("temperature", 0.9)) if do_sample else 0.0
973	    if state.seed is None:
974	        semantic_sampling_seed = _new_qwen3_tts_sampling_seed()
975	        subtalker_sampling_seed = _new_qwen3_tts_sampling_seed()
976	    else:
977	        semantic_sampling_seed, subtalker_sampling_seed = (
978	            derive_qwen3_tts_sampling_seeds(state.seed)
979	        )
980	    sampling_params = SamplingParams(
981	        max_new_tokens=int(
982	            gen_kwargs.get("max_new_tokens", QWEN3_TTS_DEFAULT_MAX_NEW_TOKENS)
983	        ),
984	        temperature=temperature,
985	        top_p=float(gen_kwargs.get("top_p", 1.0)),
986	        top_k=int(gen_kwargs.get("top_k", 50)),
987	        repetition_penalty=float(gen_kwargs.get("repetition_penalty", 1.05)),
988	        stop_token_ids=[int(model.config.codec_eos_token_id)],
989	        sampling_seed=semantic_sampling_seed,
990	    )
991	    sampling_params.normalize(None)
992	    sampling_params.verify(int(model.config.vocab_size))
993	
994	    req = Req(
995	        rid=payload.request_id,
996	        origin_input_text="",
997	        origin_input_ids=prepared.input_ids_list,
998	        sampling_params=sampling_params,
999	        eos_token_ids={int(model.config.codec_eos_token_id)},
1000	        vocab_size=int(model.config.vocab_size),
1001	    )
1002	    req.tokenizer = None
1003	    req._input_embeds_are_projected = True
1004	    req._codec_suppress_tokens = tuple(
1005	        token_id
1006	        for token_id in range(model.config.vocab_size - 1024, model.config.vocab_size)
1007	        if token_id != int(model.config.codec_eos_token_id)
1008	    )
1009	
1010	    ref_code_len = (
1011	        int(prepared.ref_code.shape[0]) if prepared.ref_code is not None else 0
1012	    )
1013	    data = Qwen3TTSSGLangRequestData(
1014	        input_ids=prepared.input_ids,
1015	        attention_mask=prepared.attention_mask,
1016	        max_new_tokens=int(
1017	            gen_kwargs.get("max_new_tokens", QWEN3_TTS_DEFAULT_MAX_NEW_TOKENS)
1018	        ),
1019	        temperature=temperature,
1020	        output_ids=req.output_ids,
1021	        req=req,
1022	        ref_code=prepared.ref_code,
1023	        ref_code_len=ref_code_len,
1024	        prompt_input_embeds=prepared.prompt_input_embeds,
1025	        semantic_sampling_seed=semantic_sampling_seed,
1026	        subtalker_dosample=bool(gen_kwargs.get("subtalker_dosample", True)),
1027	        subtalker_temperature=float(gen_kwargs.get("subtalker_temperature", 0.9)),
1028	        subtalker_top_p=float(gen_kwargs.get("subtalker_top_p", 1.0)),
1029	        subtalker_top_k=int(gen_kwargs.get("subtalker_top_k", 50)),
1030	        subtalker_sampling_seed=subtalker_sampling_seed,
1031	        engine_start_s=time.perf_counter(),
1032	    )
1033	    data.suppress_tokens = list(req._codec_suppress_tokens)
1034	    data.pending_text_queue = PendingTextTensorQueue.from_tensor(
1035	        prepared.trailing_text_hidden
1036	    )
1037	    data.tts_pad_embed = prepared.tts_pad_embed
1038	    data.input_embeds_are_projected = True
1039	    data.stage_payload = payload
1040	    return data
1041	
1042	
1043	def apply_sglang_qwen3_tts_result(
1044	    payload: StagePayload,
1045	    data: Qwen3TTSSGLangRequestData,
1046	) -> StagePayload:
1047	    code_parts: list[torch.Tensor] = []
1048	    if data.ref_code is not None and data.ref_code_len:
1049	        code_parts.append(data.ref_code.to(dtype=torch.long))
1050	    if data.output_codes:
1051	        code_parts.append(torch.stack(data.output_codes, dim=0).to(dtype=torch.long))
1052	
1053	    if code_parts:
1054	        device = code_parts[0].device
1055	        codes = torch.cat(
1056	            [part.to(device=device, dtype=torch.long) for part in code_parts],
1057	            dim=0,
1058	        ).cpu()
1059	    else:
1060	        codes = torch.empty((0, 0), dtype=torch.long)
1061	
1062	    return StagePayload(
1063	        request_id=payload.request_id,
1064	        request=payload.request,
1065	        data={
1066	            "audio_codes": codes,
1067	            "ref_code_len": data.ref_code_len,
1068	            "prompt_tokens": data.ref_code_len,
1069	            "completion_tokens": len(data.output_codes),
1070	            "engine_time_s": time.perf_counter() - data.engine_start_s,
1071	            "sample_rate": 24000,
1072	        },
1073	    )
1074	
1075	
1076	def make_qwen3_tts_scheduler_adapters(*, model: Any, wrapper: Any):
1077	    """Build StagePayload <-> SGLang request adapters for Qwen3-TTS."""
1078	
1079	    def request_builder(payload: StagePayload) -> Qwen3TTSSGLangRequestData:
1080	        return build_sglang_qwen3_tts_request(
1081	            payload,
1082	            model=model,
1083	            wrapper=wrapper,
1084	        )
1085	
1086	    def result_adapter(data: Qwen3TTSSGLangRequestData) -> StagePayload:
1087	        return apply_sglang_qwen3_tts_result(data.stage_payload, data)
1088	
1089	    return request_builder, result_adapter
1090

# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
"""Qwen3-TTS SGLang engine builder."""

from __future__ import annotations

import importlib
from typing import Any

from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts import request_builders
from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts import stages as qwen3_stages
from sglang_omni.scheduling.engine_factory import TtsEngineBuilder


class Qwen3TtsEngineBuilder(TtsEngineBuilder):
    model_name = "Qwen3-TTS"
    context_length = 8192
    model_arch_override = "Qwen3TTSTalker"

    def __init__(self, *, attn_implementation: str | None = None) -> None:
        self.attn_implementation = attn_implementation
        self.wrapper: Any | None = None

    def resolve_checkpoint(self, model_path: str) -> str:
        qwen3_stages.apply_qwen_tts_transformers_compatibility_patches()
        qwen_tts = importlib.import_module("qwen_tts")
        if not hasattr(qwen_tts, "Qwen3TTSModel"):
            raise ImportError("qwen_tts does not expose Qwen3TTSModel")

        return super().resolve_checkpoint(model_path)

    def pre_infra_setup(self, checkpoint_dir: str) -> None:
        del checkpoint_dir
        qwen3_stages.apply_qwen_tts_transformers_compatibility_patches()
        qwen3_stages._register_qwen3_tts_hf_config()

    def generation_defaults(
        self,
        *,
        dtype: str,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "max_running_requests": 16,
            "cuda_graph_max_bs": 32,
            "torch_compile_max_bs": 32,
            "dtype": dtype,
            "disable_cuda_graph": False,
            "disable_overlap_schedule": True,
            "enable_torch_compile": True,
            "mem_fraction_static": 0.85,
            "max_prefill_tokens": 8192,
            "sampling_backend": "pytorch",
            "trust_remote_code": True,
        }

    def setup_model(
        self,
        *,
        model_worker: Any,
        checkpoint_dir: str,
        device: str,
        gpu_id: int,
        server_args: Any,
    ) -> None:
        del gpu_id, server_args
        from qwen_tts import Qwen3TTSModel
        from transformers import AutoProcessor

        model = model_worker.model_runner.model
        speech_tokenizer = qwen3_stages._load_qwen3_tts_tokenizer(
            checkpoint_dir,
            device=device,
            dtype=self.dtype,
            attn_implementation=self.attn_implementation,
        )
        model.load_speech_tokenizer(speech_tokenizer)
        processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(
            checkpoint_dir,
            fix_mistral_regex=True,
        )
        self.wrapper = Qwen3TTSModel(
            model=model,
            processor=processor,
            generate_defaults=qwen3_stages._load_qwen3_tts_generate_defaults(
                checkpoint_dir
            ),
        )
        request_builders.set_qwen3_tts_preprocessing_context(
            model=model,
            wrapper=self.wrapper,
        )

    def compile_model(self, model: Any, server_args: Any) -> None:
        if bool(getattr(server_args, "enable_torch_compile", False)):
            qwen3_stages._compile_qwen3_tts_backbone(model)
            server_args.enable_torch_compile = False

    def make_model_runner(self, model_worker: Any, output_proc: Any) -> Any:
        model_runner_mod = importlib.import_module(
            "sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.model_runner"
        )

        return model_runner_mod.Qwen3TTSModelRunner(model_worker, output_proc)

    def make_adapters(self, model: Any) -> tuple[Any, Any]:
        return request_builders.make_qwen3_tts_scheduler_adapters(
            model=model,
            wrapper=self.wrapper,
        )

    def make_abort_callback(self) -> Any | None:
        return request_builders.cleanup_prepared_qwen3_tts_request

12	
13	__all__ = ["BatchVocoderBase"]
14	
15	
16	class BatchVocoderBase:
17	    def prepare_item(self, payload: StagePayload) -> tuple[PipelineStateBase, Any]:
18	        raise NotImplementedError
19	
20	    async def decode_batch(
21	        self, items: list[tuple[PipelineStateBase, Any]]
22	    ) -> list[tuple[torch.Tensor, int]]:
23	        raise NotImplementedError
24	
25	    def store_result(
26	        self,
27	        payload: StagePayload,
28	        state: PipelineStateBase,
29	        wav: torch.Tensor,
30	        sample_rate: int,
31	    ) -> StagePayload:
32	        raise NotImplementedError
33	
34	    def build_scheduler(
35	        self, *, max_batch_size: int = 8, max_batch_wait_ms: int = 2
36	    ) -> SimpleScheduler:
37	        async def _single(payload):
38	            state, codes = self.prepare_item(payload)
39	            results = await self.decode_batch([(state, codes)])
40	            if len(results) != 1:
41	                raise RuntimeError(
42	                    f"decode_batch returned {len(results)} results for 1 input"
43	                )
44	            wav, sr = results[0]
45	            return self.store_result(payload, state, wav, sr)
46	
47	        async def _batch(payloads):
48	            items = [self.prepare_item(p) for p in payloads]
49	            results = await self.decode_batch(items)
50	            if len(results) != len(items):
51	                raise RuntimeError(
52	                    f"decode_batch returned {len(results)} results for {len(items)} inputs"
53	                )
54	            return [
55	                self.store_result(p, s, wav, sr)
56	                for p, (s, _), (wav, sr) in zip(payloads, items, results)
57	            ]
58	
59	        return SimpleScheduler(
60	            _single,
61	            batch_compute_fn=_batch,
62	            max_batch_size=max_batch_size,
63	            max_batch_wait_ms=max_batch_wait_ms,
64	        )

def _register_omni_model(self):
        # Register sglang_omni model classes directly in SGLang's model registry.
        import importlib

        from sglang.srt.models.registry import ModelRegistry

        sglang_omni_models = {
            "S2ProSGLangTextModel": "sglang_omni.models.fishaudio_s2_pro.sglang_model:S2ProSGLangTextModel",
            "Qwen3OmniTalker": "sglang_omni.models.qwen3_omni.components.talker:Qwen3OmniTalker",
            "Qwen3OmniThinkerForCausalLM": "sglang_omni.models.qwen3_omni.components.sglang_thinker:Qwen3OmniThinkerForCausalLM",
            "HiggsMultimodalQwen3ForConditionalGeneration": "sglang_omni.models.higgs_tts.model:HiggsTTSModel",
            "Qwen3TTSTalker": "sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.sglang_model:Qwen3TTSTalker",
            "MingTTSSGLangModel": "sglang_omni.models.ming_tts.sglang_model:MingTTSSGLangModel",
            "MossTTSDelaySGLangModel": "sglang_omni.models.moss_tts.sglang_model:MossTTSDelaySGLangModel",
            "MossTTSLocalSGLangModel": "sglang_omni.models.moss_tts_local.sglang_model:MossTTSLocalSGLangModel",
            "MossTranscribeDiarizeForConditionalGeneration": "sglang_omni.models.moss_transcribe_diarize.sglang_model:MossTranscribeDiarizeForConditionalGeneration",
            "VoxtralSGLangTTSModel": "sglang_omni.models.voxtral_tts.sglang_model:VoxtralSGLangTTSModel",
            "LLaDA2MoeModelLM": "sglang_omni.models.llada2_uni.components.thinker:LLaDA2MoeModelLM",
            "WhisperForConditionalGeneration": "sglang_omni.models.whisper_asr.sglang_model:WhisperForConditionalGeneration",
            "Qwen3ASRForConditionalGeneration": "sglang_omni.models.qwen3_asr.sglang_model:Qwen3ASRForConditionalGeneration",
            "FunAsrNanoForConditionalGeneration": "sglang_omni.models.fun_asr.sglang_model:FunAsrNanoForConditionalGeneration",
        }
        for arch, path in sglang_omni_models.items():
            module_path, _, attr = path.partition(":")
            try:
                ModelRegistry.models[arch] = getattr(
                    importlib.import_module(module_path), attr
                )
            except Exception as exc:
                logger.warning(f"sglang-omni: skipping model {arch} ({exc})")

        try:
            from sglang_omni.models.ming_omni.registration import (
                register_ming_hf_config,
                register_ming_model_registry,
            )

            register_ming_hf_config()
            register_ming_model_registry()
        except Exception as exc:
            logger.warning(f"sglang-omni: skipping Ming-Omni registration ({exc})")

    def _profile_available_bytes(self, pre_model_load_memory: float) -> int:
        """Profile KV-cache headroom for colocated SGLang AR stages.

        Upstream SGLang profiles from global free-memory deltas. That is valid
        for a single AR engine, but colocated Omni stages can load multiple
        SGLang engines in separate processes on the same GPU. In that case
        another process can change global free memory while this process is
        loading weights, making the global delta too small or negative.

1	# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
2	"""Template builder for TTS SGLang AR engine stages."""
3	
4	from __future__ import annotations
5	
6	from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
7	from typing import Any
8	
9	from sglang_omni.scheduling.generation_batch_policy import (
10	    build_generation_batch_overrides,
11	    validate_generation_batch_policy,
12	)
13	from sglang_omni.utils.checkpoint import resolve_checkpoint as _resolve_checkpoint
14	
15	
16	class TtsEngineBuilder(ABC):
17	    """Base builder for TTS AR engine stages."""
18	
19	    model_name: str
20	    context_length: int
21	    model_arch_override: str | None = None
22	
23	    def build(
24	        self,
25	        model_path: str,
26	        *,
27	        device: str = "cuda:0",
28	        gpu_id: int | None = None,
29	        dtype: str = "bfloat16",
30	        server_args_overrides: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
31	    ) -> Any:
32	        from sglang_omni.scheduling import bootstrap as scheduling_bootstrap
33	        from sglang_omni.scheduling import sglang_backend
34	
35	        checkpoint_dir = self.resolve_checkpoint(model_path)
36	        if gpu_id is not None:
37	            device = f"cuda:{gpu_id}"
38	        gpu_id = int(device.split(":")[-1]) if ":" in device else 0
39	        self.checkpoint_dir = checkpoint_dir
40	        self.device = device
41	        self.gpu_id = gpu_id
42	        self.dtype = dtype
43	
44	        self.pre_infra_setup(checkpoint_dir)
45	
46	        overrides = build_generation_batch_overrides(
47	            server_args_overrides=server_args_overrides,
48	            **self.generation_defaults(dtype=dtype),
49	        )
50	        self.adjust_overrides(overrides)
51	
52	        server_args = sglang_backend.build_sglang_server_args(
53	            checkpoint_dir,
54	            context_length=self.context_length,
55	            **overrides,
56	        )
57	        self.customize_server_args(server_args)
58	
59	        infra_kwargs = dict(self.infra_kwargs())
60	        if self.model_arch_override is not None:
61	            infra_kwargs.setdefault("model_arch_override", self.model_arch_override)
62	        want_cuda_graph, (
63	            model_worker,
64	            tree_cache,
65	            req_to_token_pool,
66	            token_to_kv_pool_allocator,
67	            prefill_mgr,
68	            decode_mgr,
69	            model_config,
70	        ) = scheduling_bootstrap.create_sglang_infrastructure_defer_cuda_graph(
71	            server_args,
72	            gpu_id,
73	            **infra_kwargs,
74	        )
75	        model = model_worker.model_runner.model
76	
77	        self.setup_model(
78	            model_worker=model_worker,
79	            checkpoint_dir=checkpoint_dir,
80	            device=device,
81	            gpu_id=gpu_id,
82	            server_args=server_args,
83	        )
84	
85	        validate_generation_batch_policy(
86	            model_name=self.model_name,
87	            server_args=server_args,
88	            model_buffer_bs=self.get_model_buffer_bs(model),
89	        )
90	
91	        self.compile_model(model, server_args)
92	
93	        if want_cuda_graph:
94	            model_worker.model_runner.init_device_graphs()

# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
"""Template builder for TTS SGLang AR engine stages."""

from __future__ import annotations

from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from typing import Any

from sglang_omni.scheduling.generation_batch_policy import (
    build_generation_batch_overrides,
    validate_generation_batch_policy,
)
from sglang_omni.utils.checkpoint import resolve_checkpoint as _resolve_checkpoint


class TtsEngineBuilder(ABC):
    """Base builder for TTS AR engine stages."""

    model_name: str
    context_length: int
    model_arch_override: str | None = None

    def build(
        self,
        model_path: str,
        *,
        device: str = "cuda:0",
        gpu_id: int | None = None,
        dtype: str = "bfloat16",
        server_args_overrides: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    ) -> Any:
        from sglang_omni.scheduling import bootstrap as scheduling_bootstrap
        from sglang_omni.scheduling import sglang_backend

        checkpoint_dir = self.resolve_checkpoint(model_path)
        if gpu_id is not None:
            device = f"cuda:{gpu_id}"
        gpu_id = int(device.split(":")[-1]) if ":" in device else 0
        self.checkpoint_dir = checkpoint_dir
        self.device = device
        self.gpu_id = gpu_id
        self.dtype = dtype

        self.pre_infra_setup(checkpoint_dir)

        overrides = build_generation_batch_overrides(
            server_args_overrides=server_args_overrides,
            **self.generation_defaults(dtype=dtype),
        )
        self.adjust_overrides(overrides)

        server_args = sglang_backend.build_sglang_server_args(
            checkpoint_dir,
            context_length=self.context_length,
            **overrides,
        )
        self.customize_server_args(server_args)

        infra_kwargs = dict(self.infra_kwargs())
        if self.model_arch_override is not None:
            infra_kwargs.setdefault("model_arch_override", self.model_arch_override)
        want_cuda_graph, (
            model_worker,
            tree_cache,
            req_to_token_pool,
            token_to_kv_pool_allocator,
            prefill_mgr,
            decode_mgr,
            model_config,
        ) = scheduling_bootstrap.create_sglang_infrastructure_defer_cuda_graph(
            server_args,
            gpu_id,
            **infra_kwargs,
        )
        model = model_worker.model_runner.model

        self.setup_model(
            model_worker=model_worker,
            checkpoint_dir=checkpoint_dir,
            device=device,
            gpu_id=gpu_id,
            server_args=server_args,
        )

        validate_generation_batch_policy(
            model_name=self.model_name,
            server_args=server_args,
            model_buffer_bs=self.get_model_buffer_bs(model),
        )

        self.compile_model(model, server_args)

        if want_cuda_graph:
            model_worker.model_runner.init_device_graphs()
            self.post_cuda_graph_setup(model, server_args)

        output_proc = sglang_backend.SGLangOutputProcessor(
            capture_hidden=False,
            capture_hidden_layers=None,
            model=model,
        )
        model_runner = self.make_model_runner(model_worker, output_proc)
        request_builder, result_adapter = self.make_adapters(model)

        scheduler = self.make_scheduler(
            model_worker=model_worker,
            tree_cache=tree_cache,
            req_to_token_pool=req_to_token_pool,
            token_to_kv_pool_allocator=token_to_kv_pool_allocator,
            server_args=server_args,
            model_config=model_config,
            prefill_manager=prefill_mgr,
            decode_manager=decode_mgr,
            model_runner=model_runner,
            request_builder=request_builder,
            result_adapter=result_adapter,
        )
        self.post_scheduler_setup(scheduler, model_runner)
        return scheduler

    def resolve_checkpoint(self, model_path: str) -> str:
        return _resolve_checkpoint(model_path)

    @abstractmethod
    def generation_defaults(
        self,
        *,
        dtype: str,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError

    def pre_infra_setup(self, checkpoint_dir: str) -> None:
        del checkpoint_dir

    def adjust_overrides(self, overrides: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        del overrides

    def customize_server_args(self, server_args: Any) -> None:
        del server_args

    def infra_kwargs(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return {}

    @abstractmethod
    def setup_model(
        self,
        *,
        model_worker: Any,
        checkpoint_dir: str,
        device: str,
        gpu_id: int,
        server_args: Any,
    ) -> None:
        raise NotImplementedError

    def get_model_buffer_bs(self, model: Any) -> int | None:
        del model
        return None

    def compile_model(self, model: Any, server_args: Any) -> None:
        del model, server_args

    def post_cuda_graph_setup(self, model: Any, server_args: Any) -> None:
        del model, server_args

    @abstractmethod
    def make_model_runner(self, model_worker: Any, output_proc: Any) -> Any:
        raise NotImplementedError

    @abstractmethod
    def make_adapters(self, model: Any) -> tuple[Any, Any]:
        raise NotImplementedError

    def make_abort_callback(self) -> Any | None:
        return None

    def extra_scheduler_kwargs(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return {}

    def make_scheduler(
        self,
        *,
        model_worker: Any,
        tree_cache: Any,
        req_to_token_pool: Any,
        token_to_kv_pool_allocator: Any,
        server_args: Any,
        model_config: Any,
        prefill_manager: Any,
        decode_manager: Any,
        model_runner: Any,
        request_builder: Any,
        result_adapter: Any,
    ) -> Any:
        from sglang_omni.scheduling import omni_scheduler

        return omni_scheduler.OmniScheduler(
            tp_worker=model_worker,
            tree_cache=tree_cache,
            req_to_token_pool=req_to_token_pool,
            token_to_kv_pool_allocator=token_to_kv_pool_allocator,
            server_args=server_args,
            model_config=model_config,
            prefill_manager=prefill_manager,
            decode_manager=decode_manager,
            model_runner=model_runner,
            request_builder=request_builder,
            result_adapter=result_adapter,
            abort_callback=self.make_abort_callback(),
            **self.extra_scheduler_kwargs(),
        )

    def post_scheduler_setup(self, scheduler: Any, model_runner: Any) -> None:
        del scheduler, model_runner

# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
import sys
import threading
import types
from collections import deque
from queue import Queue
from types import SimpleNamespace

import numpy as np
import pytest
import torch

from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_omni.pending_text_queue import PendingTextTensorQueue
from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts import request_builders as qwen3_request_builders
from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.config import Qwen3TTSPipelineConfig
from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.payload_types import Qwen3TTSState
from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts.request_builders import (
    Qwen3TTSPreparedRequest,
    Qwen3TTSSGLangRequestData,
    apply_sglang_qwen3_tts_result,
    build_embedding_cache_key_ids,
    build_qwen3_tts_state,
    build_sglang_qwen3_tts_request,
    derive_qwen3_tts_sampling_seeds,
)
from sglang_omni.models.registry import PIPELINE_CONFIG_REGISTRY
from sglang_omni.proto import OmniRequest, StagePayload
from sglang_omni.sampling import seed as sampling_seed
from sglang_omni.scheduling.messages import IncomingMessage
from sglang_omni.scheduling.omni_scheduler import OmniScheduler
from sglang_omni.scheduling.speaker_cache import (
    SpeakerCacheKey,
    get_speaker_artifact_cache,
)
from sglang_omni.scheduling.types import RequestOutput


def install_fake_sglang(monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch) -> None:
    try:
        import sglang.srt.managers.schedule_batch  # noqa: F401
        import sglang.srt.managers.scheduler  # noqa: F401
        import sglang.srt.sampling.sampling_params  # noqa: F401

        return
    except ImportError:
        pass

    class FakeReq:
        def __init__(
            self,
            *,
            rid,
            origin_input_text,
            origin_input_ids,
            sampling_params,
            eos_token_ids=None,
            vocab_size=None,
            **kwargs,
        ) -> None:
            del kwargs
            self.rid = rid
            self.origin_input_text = origin_input_text
            self.origin_input_ids = origin_input_ids
            self.sampling_params = sampling_params
            self.eos_token_ids = eos_token_ids
            self.vocab_size = vocab_size
            self.output_ids = []
            self.prefix_indices = []
            self.extend_input_len = len(origin_input_ids)

    class FakeSamplingParams:
        def __init__(self, **kwargs) -> None:
            self.__dict__.update(kwargs)
            self.min_p = kwargs.get("min_p", 0.0)

        def normalize(self, tokenizer) -> None:
            del tokenizer

        def verify(self, vocab_size) -> None:
            self.vocab_size = vocab_size

    class FakeGenerationBatchResult:
        def __init__(self, *, logits_output=None, can_run_cuda_graph=False) -> None:
            self.logits_output = logits_output
            self.can_run_cuda_graph = can_run_cuda_graph
            self.next_token_ids = None

def test_qwen3_tts_preprocessing_abort_cleans_prepared_state() -> None:
    """Aborting after preprocessing stored tensors must release the handoff."""
    from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts import stages

    request_id = "req-prepared-abort"
    try:
        with qwen3_request_builders._PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
            qwen3_request_builders._PREPARED_REQUESTS[request_id] = object()

        scheduler = stages.create_preprocessing_executor("model")
        scheduler.abort(request_id)

        with qwen3_request_builders._PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
            assert request_id not in qwen3_request_builders._PREPARED_REQUESTS
    finally:
        qwen3_request_builders.cleanup_prepared_qwen3_tts_request(request_id)


def test_qwen3_tts_preprocessing_abort_race_cleans_late_prepared_state(
    monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch,
) -> None:
    """If preprocessing finishes after abort, its late prepared tensors are dropped."""
    from sglang_omni.models.qwen3_tts import stages

    request_id = "req-preprocess-race"
    started = threading.Event()
    release = threading.Event()

    def fake_preprocess(payload: StagePayload) -> StagePayload:
        started.set()
        assert release.wait(timeout=2.0)
        with qwen3_request_builders._PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
            qwen3_request_builders._PREPARED_REQUESTS[payload.request_id] = object()
        return payload

    monkeypatch.setattr(stages, "preprocess_qwen3_tts_payload", fake_preprocess)
    scheduler = stages.create_preprocessing_executor("model")
    payload = make_payload(inputs="target")
    payload.request_id = request_id
    loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
    errors: list[Exception] = []

    def run_compute() -> None:
        try:
            scheduler._run_single(
                IncomingMessage(
                    request_id=request_id,
                    type="new_request",
                    data=payload,
                ),
                loop,
            )
        except Exception as exc:
            errors.append(exc)

    thread = threading.Thread(target=run_compute)
    try:
        thread.start()
        assert started.wait(timeout=2.0)

        scheduler.abort(request_id)
        release.set()
        thread.join(timeout=2.0)

        assert not thread.is_alive()
        assert errors == []
        assert scheduler.outbox.empty()
        with qwen3_request_builders._PREPARED_REQUESTS_LOCK:
            assert request_id not in qwen3_request_builders._PREPARED_REQUESTS
    finally:
        release.set()
        thread.join(timeout=2.0)
        loop.close()
        qwen3_request_builders.cleanup_prepared_qwen3_tts_request(request_id)

    """The AR scheduler abort path also owns the prepared handoff cleanup."""
    request_id = "req-ar-abort"

139	def wire(
140	    default: Any = MISSING,
141	    *,
142	    default_factory: Any = MISSING,
143	    emit: str | None = None,
144	    codec: str = "raw",
145	) -> Any:
146	    """dataclasses.field carrying wire metadata for DeclarativeStateBase.
147	
148	    emit defaults by inference: fields whose default is None emit only when
149	    not None; everything else always emits. codec="typed_tensor" expands to
150	    the {name}_bytes/_shape/_dtype key triple via scheduling.typed_tensor.
151	    """
152	    _validate_emit_mode(emit)
153	    if codec != "typed_tensor" and codec not in _CODECS:
154	        raise ValueError(f"unknown wire codec: {codec!r}")
155	    metadata = {"wire": _WireSpec(emit=emit, codec=codec)}
156	    if default_factory is not MISSING:
157	        return field(default_factory=default_factory, metadata=metadata)
158	    return field(default=default, metadata=metadata)

161	def _spec_of(f: dataclasses.Field) -> _WireSpec:
162	    return f.metadata.get("wire", _DEFAULT_SPEC)
163	
164	
165	def _default_of(f: dataclasses.Field) -> Any:
166	    if f.default is not MISSING:
167	        return f.default
168	    if f.default_factory is not MISSING:  # type: ignore[misc]
169	        return f.default_factory()  # type: ignore[misc]
170	    return None
171	
172	
173	def _emit_kind(f: dataclasses.Field, spec: _WireSpec) -> str:
174	    _validate_emit_mode(spec.emit)
175	    if spec.emit is not None:
176	        return spec.emit
177	    if f.default is not MISSING and f.default is None:
178	        return "not_none"
179	    return "always"

182	def _has_complete_typed_tensor_payload(data: dict[str, Any], name: str) -> bool:
183	    required = {f"{name}_bytes", f"{name}_shape"}
184	    keys = (*required, f"{name}_dtype")
185	    specified = {key for key in keys if key in data}
186	    if not specified:
187	        return False
188	    null_keys = {key for key in specified if data[key] is None}
189	    if null_keys:
190	        invalid_keys = ", ".join(sorted(null_keys))
191	        raise ValueError(
192	            f"invalid typed_tensor payload for {name}: null {invalid_keys}"
193	        )
194	    missing = required - specified
195	    if missing:
196	        missing_keys = ", ".join(sorted(missing))
197	        raise ValueError(
198	            f"incomplete typed_tensor payload for {name}: missing {missing_keys}"
199	        )
200	    return True
201	
202	
203	@dataclass
204	class DeclarativeStateBase(PipelineStateBase):
205	    """PipelineStateBase with to_dict/from_dict derived from field metadata.
206	
207	    Subclasses declare wire behavior inline with wire(...) fields instead of
208	    hand-writing the serialization pair; plain fields default to
209	    always-emitted raw passthrough (None-defaulted fields emit only when set).
210	    Usage fields keep the append_usage_fields contract. The field-complete
211	    round-trip contract test in tests/unit_test/scheduling/test_pipeline_state.py
212	    pins both the wire layout and the restored attributes per model.
213	    """
214	
215	    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
216	        data: dict[str, Any] = {}
217	        for f in dataclasses.fields(self):
218	            if f.name in _USAGE_FIELDS:
219	                continue
220	            spec = _spec_of(f)
221	            self._encode_field(data, f, spec, _emit_kind(f, spec))
222	        self.append_usage_fields(data)
223	        return data
